description: 定義 unified lesson view 的 mock/runtime information architecture，涵蓋 primary content surfaces、support detail surfaces、navigation/panel contract、mock verification 與 Flutter transfer boundary。

tasks.desc: Define unified lesson view scope and content surface taxonomy, separating primary content surfaces (video/dialogue/article) from support detail surfaces (knowledge lab grammar/pattern/usage/vocab).
Freeze primary content surface contract for video, dialogue, and article, including primary display states, reading/listening emphasis, and bilingual visibility.
Freeze support detail surface contract for knowledge lab grammar, pattern, usage, and vocab panels, including what is inline, what is expandable, and fallback behavior.
Define navigation and panel interaction contract for lesson runtime, including primary/support panel coordination, selection state, and back/forward behavior.
Write mock verification criteria for the unified lesson view contract, covering fixture shape, state transitions, missing-data behavior, and contract mismatch reporting.
Define the Flutter transfer boundary for the frozen unified lesson view contract, including what the frontend may adapt and what must remain contract-stable.
Document acceptance criteria and remaining gaps for downstream Flutter transfer, so runtime mock coverage can be validated before implementation moves to Flutter.
